section.heading: Prohibition of Federal workplace wellness requirements

content.p: Notwithstanding any other provision of this part, any recommendations, data, or assessments carried out under this part shall not be used to mandate requirements for workplace wellness programs.

section.sourceCredit: (July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title III, § 399MM–3, as added Pub. L. 111–148, title IV, § 4303, Mar. 23, 2010, 124 Stat. 583.)
